questions: What is the new golden age of marketing?
Which capabilities define modern marketing leaders?
qa.answer: Data, technology, and creative integration enable precision at scale with faster cycles and better accountability. Leaders unify brand + performance, build agile operating models, and modernize measurement.
implication: Integrate data/tech with creative ops; deploy agile pods around journeys.
Establish unified KPIs across the funnel and calibrate with experiments.
Invest in talent that blends analytics, tech, and creativity.
